text.title: mobile-responsive Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: viewport meta -> mobile-first CSS -> tap targets -> dvh fix -> Playwright + Lighthouse gate.

step.name: viewport-meta
step.decision-gate: If existing meta has `user-scalable=no`, remove it (a11y blocker).

step.name: mobile-first-css
step.action: Rewrite styles to default at 320px; use `@media (min-width: ...)` for upgrades. Replace fixed px with clamp/%.
step.decision-gate: If too many fixed px exist, do iterative migration component-by-component.

step.name: tap-targets
step.decision-gate: If a dense layout cannot afford 44px, redesign — never reduce below 44px.

step.name: dvh-fix
step.decision-gate: If supporting older browsers, ship `100vh` fallback before the dvh declaration.

step.name: verification-gate
step.decision-gate: Block merge if Lighthouse perf < 85 or a11y < 95, or if Playwright sees horizontal scroll.
